briefing: Markets are moderately risk-on today with NASDAQ +1.5% and S&P500 +0.8%, likely supported by end-of-quarter positioning and continued tech momentum. BRUN is the standout candidate — it is the only score-100 pick with all four required multi-signal confirmations including a volume surge, which strategy memory flags as the strongest indication of institutional buying. Deploying remaining cash into BRUN while holding all six existing positions, which remain inside stop-loss and profit-target bounds.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A volume surge occurs when a stock's trading volume is significantly higher than its recent average — in this system, more than 1.5x the 20-day average. It is a key signal because unusually high volume on an up day suggests that large institutional investors (mutual funds, hedge funds) are actively buying, not just retail traders. When a price breakout is accompanied by a volume surge, the move is considered more reliable and sustainable than one on thin volume.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 成交量激增是指某支股票的當日交易量遠高於近期平均水平——本策略定義為超過20日平均量的1.5倍。這是一個關鍵技術訊號，因為在股價上漲日出現異常放量，往往代表大型機構投資者（如共同基金、對沖基金）正在積極建倉，而非僅由散戶推動。當價格突破伴隨成交量激增時，該突破被認為更具可信度與持續性，而非曇花一現的虛假走勢。

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities rallied on the final trading day of Q2 2026, with the NASDAQ leading at +1.5% and the S&P 500 gaining +0.8%, driven by end-of-quarter window dressing as institutional fund managers rebalance portfolios and boost holdings in outperforming names before quarter-end reporting. Tech and semiconductor names led the advance as AI-related spending expectations remained elevated. The broad risk-on tone reflected continued confidence in the economic soft-landing narrative, with no major macro surprises to disrupt sentiment.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股在2026年第二季度最後一個交易日全面上漲，那斯達克指數領漲1.5%，標普500指數上升0.8%。市場動能主要來自季末「窗口美化」操作——機構基金經理在季度末前積極調整持倉，拉抬績優股以美化報表。科技與半導體板塊領漲，反映市場對人工智能相關資本支出前景的持續樂觀預期。整體風險偏好偏強，市場對經濟「軟著陸」情境信心未減，宏觀層面亦未出現重大意外衝擊。

trades.reasoning: Top-scoring candidate (100) with all five signal confirmations — RSI in bullish zone, MACD crossover, rising histogram, price above SMA-20, and a volume surge indicating institutional participation; cash above $500 with 4 open slots on a risk-on day warrants deployment.
